name: Wolf Volcano
eruptionHistory: The highest volcano in the Galápagos. Erupted in 2015 and 2022. The 2015 eruption threatened the habitat of the only population of pink iguanas.
description: Wolf Volcano is the highest point in the Galápagos Islands. It is home to the only population of Galápagos pink land iguanas, threatened by volcanic eruptions.
